fields.description:
# Re-home CLAUDE.md-native content into authoritative docs

## Why

Slimming the root guidance file (S2) requires the content it currently owns to have an
authoritative home in `docs/` first, so nothing is lost. A grounded read of `docs/` shows only
the `idea` status is genuinely unhomed; the parent-first cascade already lives in
`docs/concurrency.md` I4a, and the linking/tags write-level mechanics already live in
`docs/event-schema.md` (LINK/UNLINK and TAG_DELTA rows). The real gap is one **agent-facing
conceptual home** for the ticket model, plus two smaller gaps confirmed by reading the files.

## What

- Create **`docs/ticket-model.md`** holding the *agent-facing concept* for four topics: the
  `idea` status lifecycle, hierarchy/containment (`parent_id`, not a link relation), linking (the
  six relations + the promotion *concept*), and the tags surface + the `--set-tags` add-wins
  caveat. Cross-reference `docs/event-schema.md` for write-level event mechanics — do not restate
  event bodies (drift risk).
- Fold CLAUDE.md's cascade **gate-interaction** paragraph into `docs/concurrency.md` I4a, which
  already documents the cascade itself.
- Replace the pointer in `docs/event-schema.md:46` (its CREATE row currently says *"see CLAUDE.md
  'Session logs'"*) with a real `## The session_log ticket type` section carrying the type
  semantics.
- Add the session-log **auto-rotation** detail (the `.rebar/current_session_log` pointer + session
  fingerprint) to `docs/user-guide.md`, which already documents the capture helper (lines ~170-172)
  but not auto-rotation. Cross-reference the session-id resolver already documented in
  `docs/config.md` (§ ~429-434).
- Index `docs/ticket-model.md` in `docs/README.md`.

## Scope

In: `docs/ticket-model.md` (new) and `docs/{event-schema,concurrency,user-guide,README}.md`.
Out: editing `CLAUDE.md` (that is S2) and any code change. Docs-only.

## Design decisions (spike-validated, file-grounded)

The "five topics with no backing doc" premise was partly wrong. Only `idea` is unhomed; the
cascade (concurrency.md I4a) and the linking/tags write mechanics (event-schema.md) already have
homes, and the session-id resolver is already in config.md/session-id-shims.md. So this story
adds a concept doc + three targeted gap-fills (cascade gate-nuance, a real session_log section
replacing an existing CLAUDE.md pointer, and the missing auto-rotation detail), not a bulk move.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `docs/ticket-model.md` exists and documents all four concept topics with cross-refs to
  `docs/event-schema.md` and no restated event bodies.
  - Proving: `test -f docs/ticket-model.md && [ "$(rg -c 'idea|parent_id|discovered_from|set-tags' docs/ticket-model.md)" -ge 4 ] && rg -q 'event-schema' docs/ticket-model.md`
- [ ] `docs/concurrency.md` I4a gains the cascade gate-interaction nuance (parent's own
  plan-review gate; epics/stories not gate-exempt; `--force` propagates).
  - Proving: `rg -n 'gate-exempt|plan-review gate|--force' docs/concurrency.md`
- [ ] `docs/event-schema.md` gains a `## The session_log ticket type` section AND no longer defers
  session_log semantics to CLAUDE.md.
  - Proving: `rg -q '## The session_log ticket type' docs/event-schema.md && [ "$(rg -c "see CLAUDE.md .Session logs" docs/event-schema.md)" = 0 ]`
- [ ] `docs/user-guide.md` gains the session-log auto-rotation detail (currently absent).
  - Proving: `rg -n 'auto-rotat|current_session_log' docs/user-guide.md` (currently returns 0 hits; must be ≥1 after the work)
- [ ] `docs/README.md` indexes `docs/ticket-model.md`.
  - Proving: `rg -n 'ticket-model' docs/README.md`
- [ ] `make lint` passes.
  - Proving: `make lint`
